# Kodable.ai

> A small studio that uses AI to scale small local businesses across Spain. We build fast websites, AI agents that answer customers 24/7, custom tools and automations. Bilingual (English / Español). Free, no-pressure consultation; real people who answer after launch.

## Services
- [Websites](https://kodable.ai/en/services/websites): Fast, AI-built sites that show up when people search nearby and turn a curious visitor into a booking.
- [AI Agents](https://kodable.ai/en/services/ai-agents): A friendly assistant that answers customers, takes bookings and handles reception on WhatsApp and your site, 24/7.
- [Custom Tools](https://kodable.ai/en/services/custom-tools): Software built around how you actually work.
- [Automations](https://kodable.ai/en/services/automations): Hands-off workflows that remove the busywork.
